interface.shortDescription: Agent skills for BIRD routing daemon configuration, editor setup, and CI/CD workflows.

plugins.name: bird-agent
plugins.description: Write, validate, format, and debug BIRD routing daemon configs with parser-backed diagnostics.

plugins.name: bird-source-explorer
plugins.description: Explore the BIRD Internet Routing Daemon C source code to answer deep implementation questions and find where features, protocols, and filter functions are defined.

plugins.name: bird-troubleshooting
plugins.description: Diagnose complex BIRD routing-daemon problems that cross configuration, source-code, and tooling boundaries.

plugins.name: birdcc-cicd
plugins.description: Add setup-birdcc to GitHub Actions workflows.

plugins.name: birdcc-installer
plugins.description: Install BIRD editor support and the birdcc CLI.
